track_description: Background building-code, appliance-standard, and refurbishment improvements that reduce residential service energy intensity without creating a new user-selectable package.
evidence_summary: Australian building-efficiency programs and AEMO demand forecasting evidence support a modest background improvement across residential incumbent and partially electrified service bundles.
derivation_method: De-embed a common role-wide standards-and-refurbishment drift from the applicable method rows, then carry it explicitly through the autonomous track so route-specific electrification effects remain in the pathway methods.
double_counting_guardrail: Applies only to the incumbent and electrified-efficiency residential methods after the same background drift is removed from method_years.csv; deep-electric remains excluded because it already represents the role frontier.
review_notes: Common calibration-first decomposition so the explicit standards drift preserves the prior role trajectory without double counting against package overlays.
